description: First RFC 3161 cert chain (.chain.pem) has one character in the first cert body mutated (stays within base64 alphabet so PEM parses; cert signature or chain link breaks for THAT TSA).

modifications.mutation: First non-BEGIN/END/empty line, character at offset 10, flipped within base64 alphabet (A→B, a→b, 0→1, '+'↔'/').
modifications.rationale: Documents V1 verifier behavior under single-TSA chain tamper: check 2 catches the file SHA mismatch; check 6 does NOT (≥2 of 3 TSAs still verify, satisfying spec §11.1).

notes: V1 verifier does NOT fail check 6 on this fixture (same multi-TSA tolerance as forged-rfc3161).
